per_symbol.description: NYMEX WTI Light Sweet Crude (1000 bbl, $1000/$ multiplier, tick 0.01 = $10)
Micro WTI Crude (100 bbl, $100/$ multiplier, tick 0.01 = $1)
COMEX Gold (100 troy oz, $100/oz multiplier, tick 0.10 = $10)
Micro Gold (10 troy oz, $10/oz multiplier, tick 0.10 = $1)

binding_t_live.rationale: H060 design.md section 2 is daily-cadence by construction (canonical MOP 2012 monthly-rebalance evaluated on daily closes); ohlcv-1d is the correct extraction schema. ohlcv-1m quotes retained for transparency and as upper-bound reference if a successor v2 hypothesis requires intraday-grain CL/GC features.

notes: Initial ohlcv-1m run produced $313.88 total -- substantially OVER both ceilings.
Re-quote at ohlcv-1d produced $7.63 total -- well within the $30 tight budget.
Schema correction is the binding decision per the H050 Cell-I memo section 1.5 verification gap.
ES/NQ are NOT re-extracted; the existing data/processed/vendor_legacy_1min_roll_adjusted/ substrate downsamples to daily-close in code per H060 section 2 cadence.
Per the 2026-05-12 operator-shared-key-in-chat-transcript event, the api_key_fingerprint field is suppressed per the script's defense-in-depth hardening.
operator_action_recommended: Authorize P1-DATABENTO-METALS-ENERGY-EXTRACTION-AUTHORIZE at $7.63 USD ohlcv-1d schema for CL.FUT + MCL.FUT + GC.FUT + MGC.FUT over 2015-2025; this is within the $30 tight budget ceiling per ADR-0023 section Decision-6.
